position: Senior Machine Learning Engineer - AI Platform
req: 6+ years of experience in machine learning and AI development. Strong expertise in Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, and scikit-learn. Experience deploying ML models to production environments. Knowledge of MLOps practices and tools (MLflow, Kubeflow). Experience with large-scale distributed systems and big data technologies. PhD or Master's degree in Computer Science, AI, or related field preferred.
notes: Competitive compensation with equity participation. Comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance. 401(k) matching up to 8%. Flexible hybrid work arrangement. Annual learning and development budget of $5000. Access to cutting-edge GPU clusters and research resources. Conference attendance support.
duties: Design, develop, and deploy production-grade machine learning models. Build and maintain ML pipelines and infrastructure. Collaborate with data scientists to optimize model performance. Implement A/B testing frameworks for model evaluation. Monitor model performance and implement retraining strategies. Research and implement state-of-the-art ML techniques. Document technical specifications and best practices.
selection: Selection process includes take-home ML modeling challenge, technical interview covering algorithms and system design, presentation of previous ML projects, code review session, and behavioral interview. GitHub portfolio and published research papers are highly valued.
